regime_hint.notes: NIFTY closed 23,815.85 (-1.49% on Mon), ATR 1.44%, vol LOW. Daily regime downgraded to RANGING after Mon's heavy down day. GIFT Nifty -0.43% (~23,730) → mild gap-down expected. US Mon: SPX +0.20%, Nasdaq +0.10% — chip/AI led, muted. USD/INR 95.32 (rupee weakened 0.75% — IT exporter tailwind restored vs Mon's 94.5). Brent +1.02% to ~$105.27 (still bearish India macro, Hormuz risk persists). Gold flat. India VIX API still down — treat as NORMAL given ATR. FII heavy seller Mon (-Rs 8,438 cr), DII absorbed (+Rs 5,940 cr). KEY EVENT: US CPI release ~8:30 PM IST tonight — post-close, so no in-session shock, but pre-print jitters will compress range and thin participation. Binary events today: TATAPOWER Q4 + analyst call (hard avoid), PNB Q4 (hard avoid, also outside universe). BHARTIARTL Q4 tomorrow. BPCL trading window closed until May 21.

watchlist.notes: Sole bank pick (PNB Q4 today = banking-cluster day, max 1 bank per #lesson 2026-W19). RBI capital-easing structural tailwind. Mon gap-down -1.14%; 4 recurring RSI_EMA signals Mon (scores 54-61) — watch for 2-strategy align. New CMS ATM mandate news mildly positive; interim-chairman uncertainty mildly negative.
ORB near-miss Mon (score 79, threshold 80 — single strategy). Crude +1.02% mixed (upstream gain vs O2C). Gap-down -1.06%. JioStar copyright suit is noise, not a binary. Strict 2+ confirmations.
FMCG defensive — preferred in weak tape. Smallest gap (-0.15%) across watchlist. Q4 ~May 21 (outside binary window). Watch VWAP holds; both bias since Mon's 'both' produced 0 signals.
Pharma defensive. Q4 May 21 (outside). Organon financing remains soft headline risk but no scheduled event. Gap-down -1.12%. Carry from Mon (no signal).

IT, rupee tailwind restored — USD/INR 95.32 (vs 94.5 Mon). Gap-down -0.27%. Mon: 1 ORB signal score 64 rejected on 1-strat rule. Conviction bumped on rupee move. Strict 2+ confirmations (#lesson 2026-05-07 high-score bypass).
IT diversifier on rupee tailwind day. No fresh Gemini-flagged news. Volume score 0 in scanner (lower liquidity than INFY/TCS) — track only as alternate IT exposure if INFY range-bound.
FMCG defensive diversifier. No event risk visible. Low-volatility classic defensive — useful if RANGING tape stays compressed pre-CPI.
HARD BLOCK — Q4 FY26 results + dividend board meeting today + analyst call 6 PM IST. Binary event. Was 'both' on Mon's carry plan; flips to AVOID today. #lesson 2026-04-30.

rationale: Post heavy -1.49% NIFTY day, regime RANGING + pre-CPI compression. 7 tradeable (all 'both' bias per #lesson 2026-W19) + 1 hard avoid (TATAPOWER Q4 today). All names 'both' since directional bias missed 3 of last 4 sessions and the bias-invalidation hook is still not wired (#lesson 2026-05-08, third recurrence). Banking-cluster rule applied — PNB Q4 today means max 1 bank → HDFCBANK selected (RBI tailwind + recurring intraday setups). IT bench widened to INFY + HCLTECH because rupee weakened back to 95.32 (vs 94.5 Mon) — exporter tailwind is the cleanest single-factor catalyst on the tape. Defensives ITC + SUNPHARMA + HINDUNILVR overweighted vs Mon for pre-CPI compression. Risk tightened (3/1.0%/2) — same as Mon — to limit unexited capital exposure given partial-qty EOD bug still unfixed (#lesson 2026-W19, 4 recurrences last week). Explicit exclusions: TATAPOWER (Q4 today — was on watchlist Mon, now avoid), PNB (Q4 today + outside NIFTY 50), BHARTIARTL (Q4 tomorrow May 13 — insider window through May 15), BPCL (window closed until May 21), SBIN (-4% Mon on margin squeeze + Iran warning — extreme negative tape), ETERNAL (outside NIFTY 50), TCS (kept off — yesterday's plan flagged legal-headline risk; rupee tailwind isn't reason enough to revisit alone), KOTAKBANK (RBI stake-acquisition positive but banking-cluster cap = 1), ICICIBANK / AXISBANK (banking-cluster cap), ADANIENT (cooldown from Apr/May SL violations).
lessons_applied: #lesson 2026-W19: default to bias 'both' — every tradeable name today is 'both'
#lesson 2026-W19: high-score bypass loophole — every entry must clear MIN_CONFIRMATIONS=2 (esp. INFY)
#lesson 2026-W19: banking-cluster Q4 days leak volatility — PNB Q4 today, kept only 1 bank (HDFCBANK)
#lesson 2026-W19: partial-qty EOD square-off bug recurred 4x — max_open_positions capped at 2
#lesson 2026-05-08: bias invalidation not executed at runtime — avoid directional bias entirely
#lesson 2026-05-05: PNB outside NIFTY 50 universe — excluded; ETERNAL same rule
#lesson 2026-04-30: binary events are hard blocks — TATAPOWER (Q4 today), PNB (Q4 today), BHARTIARTL (Q4 tomorrow), BPCL (window closed)
#lesson 2026-05-11: HIGH_CONVICTION_SCORE=60 now reachable — still must clear 2+ confirmations regardless of score
#lesson 2026-05-04: STOPPED_SYMBOL_COOLDOWN — HDFCBANK orphan reconciliation required at startup
